description: Verso (original use): Remnants of three words of a state decree in enormous calligraphic Arabic script ("...ī maṣāliḥ al-musli[mīn]" (ى مصالح المسل[امين...). Dating: pre–1108 CE, based on the identification of the scribal hand of the legal document on the recto as that of Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
